/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/link.d  -o rosidl_generator_py/robot_interfaces/robot_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_interfaces/_robot_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/projects/robo/build/robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/lyrical/lib: librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_buffer.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/lyrical/lib
